data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Amazon uses a microservices architecture to enable independent deployment, scaling, and management of services.

data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Amazon's platform is built to handle high traffic and sudden load spikes efficiently.
data.technical_spec: AWS infrastructure, horizontal scaling, load balancing.

data.title: Data-Driven Design
data.description: Architecture supports rigorous data collection for analytics and automated decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Real-time analytics, AWS Redshift, data lakes.

data.title: Cloud-Native Applications
data.description: Applications are designed to leverage cloud capabilities effectively.
data.technical_spec: AWS Lambda, serverless computing, cloud storage.

data.title: Global CDN Integration
data.description: Content Delivery Networks (CDN) are used to reduce latency and improve user experience globally.
